summary.en: As AI agents move from conversational assistants to autonomous executors, enterprises need stronger control systems. This 2026 guide explains a four-element guardrail framework—Permission, Approval, Audit Trail, and Kill Switch—for CxOs and operational leaders.
summary.ko: As AI agents move from conversational assistants to autonomous executors, enterprises need stronger control systems. This 2026 guide explains a four-element guardrail framework—Permission, Approval, Audit Trail, and Kill Switch—for CxOs and operational leaders.
summary.ja: AIエージェントが自律的に業務を遂行する時代、企業はどう統制すべきか。権限設計・承認フロー・監査ログ・Kill Switchの4要素を体系化し、CxO・実務リーダー向けに解説する2026年版ガードレール設計ガイド。

title.en: Guardrail Design in the AI Agent Era (2026 Edition) — Part 1: Philosophy & Design
title.ko: Guardrail Design in the AI Agent Era (2026 Edition) — Part 1: Philosophy & Design
title.ja: AIエージェント時代のガードレール設計（2026年版）── 前編：思想・設計編
